actions.name: ApplicationAccessAll
actions.description: Grants permission to access OpenSearch Application

actions.name: CancelAutoOptimizeJob
actions.description: Grants permission to cancel submitted Auto Optimize Job

actions.name: CancelDirectQuery
actions.description: Grants permission to cancel the query that is submitted on the OpenSearch DataSource resource

actions.name: DeleteAutoOptimizeJob
actions.description: Grants permission to delete Auto Optimize Job

actions.name: GetAutoOptimizeJob
actions.description: Grants permission to get the Auto Optimize Job details

actions.name: GetDirectQuery
actions.description: Grants permission to get the query status that are performed on the OpenSearch DataSource resource

actions.name: GetDirectQueryResult
actions.description: Grants permission to get the results of a query that is performed on the OpenSearch DataSource resource

actions.name: ListAutoOptimizeJobs
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of Auto Optimize Jobs

actions.name: StartDirectQuery
actions.description: Grants permission to start a direct query on the provided OpenSearch DataSource arns

actions.name: SubmitAutoOptimizeJob
actions.description: Grants permission to create new Auto Optimize Job
